findings.title: WORK/ADMIN/INTEG/HARD completeness not positively confirmable from focus files
findings.detail: WORK, ADMIN, INTEG, and HARD families (named in the review scope) carry zero candidate rows and zero section_count in the matrix checksum (matter-pack-no-omission-coverage-matrix.md lines 60-66, 109-129). They are declared empty (not silently omitted), but unlike M365 no explicit justification appears in the three focus files. Positive confirmation that the source workbook truly contains no WORK/ADMIN/INTEG/HARD headings depends on matter-pack-source-index.md / the workbook, which is outside the provided focus set.
findings.recommendation: Confirm against matter-pack-source-index.md before treating these four families as exhaustively extracted.

notes: 200 candidate rows verified across 12 active families (CORE 18, PERM 40, ISSUE 33, PORTAL 4, VAULT 9, AIGW 9, DRAFT 6, BILL 9, HR 16, UI 14, API 31, GOV 11), matching candidates Counts line 232 and matrix metric line 11.

All 8 named-object groups reconcile across both focus docs and actual rows: Domain objects 17, Roles 12, Audit event classes 12, Permission eval steps 10, Ethical Wall+override 6, Practice modules 32 (12 M&A + 10 Litigation + 10 Corporate), Issue Ledger invariant fields 16, HR objects 16, UI screens 14, API endpoints+events 31 (16+15).

M365 exclusion from the master candidate ledger confirmed: M365 appears only in the exclusion note (line 3) and the zero-count line (line 244); 0 M365 rows. Its appearance in the matrix checksum (11 defer_with_revisit_gate) documents delegation rather than silent omission and is not a ledger violation.

Forbidden standalone terms Activity/Lead/Contact all absent. Case-sensitive word-boundary greps returned no matches; only approved canonical compounds present: activity_signal (BILL-224), matter_stage_lead (CORE-301 terminology_ref), matter_participant_role (CORE-107). The lead hit at line 106 is the substring inside Pleading Tracker (ISSUE-177). Contact entirely absent, consistent with terminology-map conversion rule.

Family x Classification Checksum section_count column sums to 201, matching source_headings_classified_once (matrix line 10); it tallies source headings (not the 200 candidate rows) using the 7-value taxonomy and is internally consistent on that basis. Full per-bucket verification requires the source index (out of scope).
The 201 headings to 200 rows delta is consistent with one deliberate non-absorption (the Loop methodology term, terminology map line 16), not independently confirmed against the source index.
Planning-only discipline holds: every row carries units_currently_added: 0; no production_ready/contract/validator claim in any focus file.
Scope honored: M365 extraction completeness not assessed (delegated to C-MPACK-M365-01).
